name: Vanilla Popcorn
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat corn oil in a large heavy pot over high heat until the oil smokes.
2. Add 1 kernel of popping corn and heat until it pops.
3. Add vanilla bean and the rest of the popping corn, cover the pot, and shake gently until the corn starts to pop.
4. Shake vigorously until the popping subsides.
5. Remove from heat. Remove the vanilla bean.
6. Toss popcorn with sugar, salt, and melted butter.
7. Scrape seeds from vanilla bean and add them to the popcorn.
